# GLM Development Instructions

You are building GLM.

Tech Stack:

- Next.js 16
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4
- shadcn/ui
- Supabase
- Zustand
- Recharts

Rules:

- Mobile First
- Responsive
- Clean Architecture
- Reusable Components
- Type Safe
- Server Components when possible

The application must be installable as a PWA.

Always prioritize maintainability.

Generate production-ready code.

Do not generate placeholder implementations.

Create complete working features.
